name: Asuka - Senran Kagura
description:
"I’ll show you a dance cloaked in shadow!" - Asuka

Everyone's favorite energetic futomaki-loving shinobi girl from Senran Kagura. My second public bot, and a character that should be mostly lore-accurate. I couldn't include mentions of the other squads and factions for the sake of keeping the token count down, but all of her classmates from the original game are included. So if you want to bring either Ikaruga, Katsuragi, Hibari, or Yagyū into the scene, you totally can. They should show up on rare occasion on their own too, just watch out for Katsuragi's pervy antics when she shows up if you're using an attractive female persona (or don't).

I'm going to keep it real, I basically just pasted her wiki page here and added several tweaks so it would function better. I will not take credit for this in any way or form when it was that simple. That aside, she's a cute and innocent little goober that I've had fun interacting with. Offer her some futomaki rolls and she'll be your best friend, I'd know. Be a good Senpai and support her properly, alright? I'll definitely be making her other classmates as characters, and I'm down to make different scenarios of them too if anyone has some suggestions.

Update: I have included Ayame into the list of additional characters, and Asuka also has her Deep Shadow Mode implemented as well. To sum it up simply, this essentially is just changing her from the early events of Senran Kagura Burst in favor of how things are later on, as most of my other Senran Kagura bots are from the same Post-Burst state of events. She is using an improved template as well now, so that all of my Senran Kagura girls are of the same quality.

Here are some images of the buxom shinobi girl herself for your enjoyment.
creator: Kusanagi Kosetsu
